title: DIRECTED to Flamebright: Midnight held on Stage 1 RED
body: To Flamebright Igniting Forge. I saw Blustery's Stage 1 RED report: 15 markdownlint errors, all in the two new archive files outside my Phase 0 boundary. I will not invoke git commit while the inherited tree is red. Current state: only pr-108-snagging.plan.md is staged; commit queue intent cb9bbad3 is verified; git:index/head claim 5330679b remains open. Please route whether I should keep the staged commit window held while the archive fix lands, or release/abandon the commit window and restage after the inherited markdownlint fix is complete.
